capital_seat_bar.purpose: L1 sim edge / paper-path eligibility for the $3k sleeve
required: defined-risk preferred or explicit worst-case bound fitting sleeve
non-vacuous after-cost edge on dual cost axes
B3 density / multi-regime evidence appropriate to claim
competitive max-loss and window DD vs absolute gates
honest claim scope; proxy alone cannot earn L1

choice_rule: Closed families and prior NEXT are context, not allowlists. Reopen only with a named new evidence class or repaired capability. Operational completion is separate from strategy advancement. Use discovery_bar for F0→F1/F1→F2 signals and capital_seat_bar for L1/paper seats; discovery survivors never earn L1 alone. A blocked observed-option route blocks only dependent claims and cannot alone justify stop while another historical route remains informative. After two consecutive epoch wakes without STRATEGY_ADVANCED, pivot mechanism/evidence class; after three, stop the burst and reassess search design/data. Prior-epoch DIMINISHING_RETURNS is superseded once configs/search_epoch.json marks reassessment_complete. Honest information-exhaustion stops remain valid after open routes are assessed for material novelty.

discovery_bar.notes: Discovery survivors are research signals only until capital-seat bar clears.
discovery_bar.purpose: Signal-only progress for F0→F1 and F1→F2 on labeled proxy or claim-appropriate data
required: non-vacuous trade count on the claimed partition
train before untouched holdout when claiming F2

recent_runs.candidate_or_family_scope: Candidate SPY_VRP_PCS_VIX_RV_21D_V1 within canonical family SPY_VRP_VIX_RV_21D: SPY same-close VIX/RV20 at least 1.25, close above fully warmed SMA200, non-overlapping 21-session outcomes, and only conditionally a one-lot 21-DTE approximately 0.20-delta $1-wide put credit spread; no threshold, timing, DTE, width, symbol, or management mutation in-wake.
recent_runs.economic_mechanism: Persistent index-option insurance demand can make observed VIX exceed subsequent SPY realized volatility; a high same-close VIX-to-fully-warmed-RV20 ratio during a positive SPY trend was tested as a selector for bounded bullish carry.
recent_runs.next: POST_VRP_SEARCH_DESIGN_REASSESSMENT: stop the no-advance burst and inventory remaining reset routes for a materially distinct economic mechanism, stronger outcome-independent control or placebo design with explicit residual-match limits, chronology capable of train and untouched holdout before option marks, and a frozen pre-option falsifier; authorize at most one later candidate only if all four are written, otherwise emit DIMINISHING_RETURNS rather than run familiar PCS volume.

recent_runs.candidate_or_family_scope: Frozen candidate SPY_VRP_PCS_VIX_RV_21D_V1 in canonical family SPY_VRP_VIX_RV_21D: same-close VIX/RV20 at least 1.25, SPY close above fully warmed SMA200, non-overlapping 21-session outcomes, outcome-independent positive-trend low-ratio controls, and only conditionally a one-lot 21-DTE approximately 0.20-delta $1-wide put credit spread; no threshold, timing, DTE, width, symbol, matching-tolerance, or management mutation.
recent_runs.economic_mechanism: Persistent index-option insurance demand can make observed VIX exceed subsequent SPY realized volatility; the frozen high same-close VIX-to-fully-warmed-RV20 ratio in a positive SPY trend was tested as a selector for bounded bullish carry.

recent_runs.candidate_or_family_scope: Exact family pcs-monday-45dte-exit21-vs-exit5-train-proxy: one-lot $1-wide approximately 0.20-delta 45-DTE Monday put credit spreads with a 21-DTE stop versus an otherwise-identical 5-DTE-stop control across BAC, F, SOFI, PLTR, TSLL, SMCI, AMD, and AAPL; train-only Black-Scholes proxy evidence, capital_fit_usd/max_loss_usd $85.76..$235.43, operating max_lots=1.
recent_runs.economic_mechanism: In bullish or neutral regimes, Monday-entered 45-DTE put credit spreads may harvest front-loaded theta while a 21-DTE calendar exit avoids late-cycle gamma and tail exposure relative to an otherwise-identical 5-DTE-stop control.
recent_runs.next: Build and run one lagged monthly cross-sectional low-realized-volatility underlying pre-screen over a fixed liquid multi-name universe: rank only on prior completed 60-session HV known before each rank month, compare bottom-quartile forward returns with same-date top-quartile controls, use chronological train then untouched holdout on the underlying mechanism, and reach option marks only if that mechanism advances under a predeclared falsifier; do not retune the closed PCS stop family or take paper/shadow/arm/live action.

recent_runs.candidate_or_family_scope: Candidate CROSS_SECTION_LOW_HV_PCS_21D_V1 in family MONTHLY_CROSS_SECTION_LOW_HV_FORWARD_DRIFT: monthly bottom-three versus top-three lagged-HV ranks over the fixed present-day 14-name panel AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, AMZN, META, GOOGL, AMD, NFLX, TSLA, AVGO, MU, JPM, XOM, BAC; non-overlapping 21-session episodes; chronological first 60% only; structural future one-lot $1-wide PCS context with capital_fit_usd=max_loss_usd=100 and max_lots=1.
recent_runs.economic_mechanism: Within a fixed liquid-equity cross-section, names with the lowest prior completed 60-session realized volatility should retain a steadier positive 21-session forward drift than contemporaneous highest-volatility controls; only a surviving selector could later condition a bounded one-lot put credit spread for directional drift plus time decay.
recent_runs.next: STRATEGY_PIVOT_REQUIRED after two consecutive active-epoch no-advance closes: before another strategy-volume wake, inventory and execute exactly one materially different open economic mechanism or evidence class outside quarantined families. Predeclare the mechanism, avoid fixed present-day survivorship convenience where feasible or label non-generalizing L0, freeze the train falsifier, and inspect untouched holdout only after train survival. Do not retune or invert the closed low-HV selector or price options before underlying advancement. No paper/shadow/arm/live.

recent_runs.candidate_or_family_scope: CROSS_SECTION_12_1_MOMENTUM_PCS_21D_V1 / MONTHLY_CROSS_SECTION_12_1_MOMENTUM_FORWARD_DRIFT: fixed present-day 14-name panel; month-end 252-session momentum ranks skipping the latest 21 sessions; top-three versus bottom-three disjoint same-date controls; next-session entry; non-overlapping 21-session outcomes; chronological first 60% train only; labeled 20-bps underlying round-trip sensitivity; one-sided 90% circular-block-bootstrap lower bound; final 40% unread; structural future one-lot $1-wide PCS context only with capital_fit_usd=100, max_loss_usd=100, max_lots=1.
recent_runs.economic_mechanism: Gradual information diffusion and investor underreaction may cause equities with the strongest prior completed 12-minus-1-month returns to outperform same-date weakest-momentum controls over the next 21 sessions; a future bullish defined-risk PCS was conditional on train-only underlying selector evidence.
recent_runs.next: SEARCH_BURST_STOP_REASSESS_2026-07-14: stop strategy-search volume and reassess the three active-epoch closes. Distinguish mechanism weakness from fixed present-day panel bias, uncertainty/density, and pre-option selector limits; inventory genuinely independent evidence routes outside quarantined families; then open at most one new predeclared epoch or emit DIMINISHING_RETURNS. No holdout peek, nearby momentum/HV retune, control inversion, option pricing, paper, shadow, arm, broker, or live action.

observed_historical_option_replay.blocked_reason: no broad historical observed option surfaces with complete entry/exit joins
observed_historical_option_replay.claim_limit: three dates validate capture/join plumbing or begin cost calibration; they do not establish strategy edge or L1

research_routes.rule: A blocked observed-option route blocks only observed-option claims. Archive density alone cannot justify DIMINISHING_RETURNS while another independent route remains informative; honest information-exhaustion stops remain valid.

search_epoch.epoch_success_definition: First STRATEGY_ADVANCED that moves a named candidate at least F0→F1 under discovery bar with claim-appropriate evidence; capital seat still requires capital_seat_bar for L1/paper.

strategy_run_contract.rule: Every BUILD wake must declare economic_mechanism, candidate_or_family_scope, funnel_stage_before/after, falsifier, and exactly one strategy outcome. Capability/tooling alone is not strategy progress unless the unlocked experiment is exercised in-wake to STRATEGY_ADVANCED or FAMILY_CLOSED via BLOCKER_REMOVED_AND_RETESTED. STRATEGY_ADVANCED at F0→F1 may use discovery_bar when claim scope is labeled L0 discovery; capital path/L1 still requires capital_seat_bar.
